ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station in meters */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of station (e.g., manual, automatic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_data" (
  "temp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature data entry */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data entry */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature in Celsius */,
  "max_temp_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for the maximum temperature */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature in Celsius */,
  "min_temp_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for the minimum temperature */,
  "mean_temp" REAL /* Mean temperature in Celsius */,
  "mean_temp_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for the mean temperature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precipitation_data" (
  "precip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precipitation data entry */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data entry */,
  "total_rain" REAL /* Total rainfall in millimeters */,
  "total_rain_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for the total rainfall */,
  "total_snow" REAL /* Total snowfall in centimeters */,
  "total_snow_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for the total snowfall */,
  "total_precip" REAL /* Total precipitation in millimeters */,
  "total_precip_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for the total precipitation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_data" (
  "wind_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind data entry */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data entry */,
  "dir_of_max_gust" REAL /* Direction of maximum gust in tens of degrees */,
  "dir_of_max_gust_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for the direction of maximum gust */,
  "spd_of_max_gust" REAL /* Speed of maximum gust in kilometers per hour */,
  "spd_of_max_gust_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for the speed of maximum gust */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wind_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "degree_days_data" (
  "deg_days_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each degree days data entry */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data entry */,
  "heat_deg_days" REAL /* Heat degree days in Celsius */,
  "heat_deg_days_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for the heat degree days */,
  "cool_deg_days" REAL /* Cool degree days in Celsius */,
  "cool_deg_days_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for the cool degree days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deg_days_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "snow_data" (
  "snow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each snow data entry */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data entry */,
  "snow_on_grnd" REAL /* Snow on ground in centimeters */,
  "snow_on_grnd_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for the snow on ground */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("snow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the weather data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
